context: Agent must correctly process a documented Python classmethod when its signature changes. Baseline models sometimes skip decorated methods or misclassify them as implementation details.

checklist.name: Decorated classmethod updated
checklist.description: The report updates the from_env docstring to document the new profile parameter

checklist.name: Decorator not treated as out of scope
checklist.description: The report does NOT say from_env is skipped, out of scope, or ignored because it is a classmethod/decorated symbol

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: The report does NOT claim to have edited README.md directly; markdown remains propose-only

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
